We introduce a new state-of-the-art membership inference attack, InfoRMIA that dominates RMIA on all benchmarks. We also propose a token-level attack framework that has high power and can pinopint info leakage to token levels.

sample_keywords: SpareTrain is a novel framework that achieves full DMR protection for LLM training with negligible overhead, by repurposing activation checkpointing and exploiting idle GPU time to preserve throughput.
We propose DASH, a high-throughput scheduling framework that accelerates the deterministic backward pass of attention for reproducible LLM training by up to 1.28$\times$.

We introduce speculative actions—a lossless framework that predicts likely actions using faster models, enabling multiple API calls to be executed in parallel and thus yields substantial acceleration.
An automated approach for lifting Sequence Parallelism, and other targeted memory optimisations for long-context training, into the compiler.
